body.title: Investigate SYSCFG safety gate nodes in clan.memories
body.result: deleted 3 pre-fix SYSCFG nodes from clan.memories; §8 Check 4 updated GAP→RESOLVED in ToO doc
body.description:
TheoryOfOperation §8 check 4 says SYSCFG_IGOR_TIER5_ENABLED, SYSCFG_IGOR_ARBITER_ENABLED, SYSCFG_IGOR_SELF_EDIT_ENABLED should not exist in clan.memories (0 rows expected). 2026-05-30 alignment check returned 3 rows — all 3 are present.

Doc claims safety gates are filesystem-only. Actual state contradicts this.

**Affected files:** docs/TheoryOfOperation.md §4 (safety gates section), possibly devices/igor/ or skeleton/ code
**Scope boundary:** IN — determine whether SYSCFG nodes should be in DB; if not, remove them and update doc; if yes, update doc to match reality; OUT — do not change gate behavior, only align doc with truth
**Test plan:** After fix, re-run query 4 — either returns 0 rows (if removed) or §8 doc updated to say they may exist
**Completion criteria:** DB state and doc are consistent
